title: How can I utilize the API to "Pin to top" an update of an item?
excerpt: I’m looking to pin a specific update on each user story. However, I’m unable to find the pin ability in the API. Is there such an ability within the API? If so, it would be extremely useful. If not, totally understand an…

posts.author: GrantMe (Grant)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to pin a specific update on each user story. However, I’m unable to find the pin ability in the API. Is there such an ability within the API? If so, it would be extremely useful. If not, totally understand and I would recommend the feature in the future.

Please let me know if you’re able to find how to “Pin to top” an update of an item using the API / GraphQL mutation.

Thank you

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @GrantMe and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

There is no way of doing that using the API as of today.

I have created a request for it for our team

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
